title: Update for c/image's update of github.com/gobuffalo/pop
body:
… to update for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1636 :

> go mod edit -replace github.com/containers/image/v5=github.com/mtrmac/image/v5@pop-v5-override
> go mod tidy -go=1.16 && go mod tidy -go=1.17
> make vendor

The (go mod tidy) pair is necessary to keep c/image CI working.
